props.name: description
props.description: Body text (required). Override with the default slot for rich content.

props.name: href
props.description: Link href. When set (and no `link` slot is provided) a link is rendered.

props.name: linkText
props.description: Link text. Defaults to the i18n catalog's "Learn more".

props.name: closable
props.description: Render the close button. Defaults to `false` (not dismissible).

props.name: closeLabel
props.description: Close button accessible name. Defaults to the i18n catalog's "Close".

props.name: open
props.description: Controls visibility (bindable). Dismissing sets it to `false`; set it back to `true` to show the alert again.

props.name: role
props.description: Live-region role. `"status"` (polite) by default; `"alert"` for urgent.

props.name: inverted
props.description: High-contrast inverse surface (opposite of the page) for maximum visibility.

props.name: plain
props.description: No-surface variant: drop the tinted background and border (the message sits on the page). The status stays visible via the colored FeedbackIcon chip.

props.name: iconShape
props.description: Shape of the FeedbackIcon box — `"rounded"` (default) or a full `"round"` circle.

props.name: iconBox
props.description: FeedbackIcon box override. By default the box is tinted on plain/inverted alerts and transparent on tinted surfaces (so it doesn't clash); set `"tint"` or `"solid"` to force a visible chip on a tinted surface too.

props.name: snack
props.description: Snackbar layout: one compact, vertically-centered row — icon, title and inline actions — in a container that wraps its content. The description is dropped and the icon takes the text color with no box. Meant for the floating `Notification`, not the in-page banner.

props.name: component
props.description: Render arbitrary content as the body instead of `description` / the default slot — a Svelte component plus its props. Lets a data-driven notifier carry rich content (a file preview, an avatar row). Ignored in `snack` layout.
